Sarkar, Vice Chairman, Railway Claims Tribunal Bench at Calcutta to act as the “Chairman of the Railway Claims Tribunal until the date on “ which a new Chairman, appointed in accordance with the provisions of the Railway Claims ‘Tribunal Act to fill such vacancy enters upon his office.
